title: Randomized Armor Loot
description: Randomizes chest armor loot, while keeping it balanced by type and strength.
body:
Are you tired of getting the same **old vanilla armors** inside chests ?

Do you have **too many armors mod** ? 

Are you **too lazy to make** some of the armors in your mods ?

If so, then this mod is ideal for you !

**Randomized Armor Loot** makes it so that every armor piece in chest loot is random ...in a balanced way !

If the replaced armor piece is **boots** for instance, then the armor piece will be replaced by a **random pair of boots** with the equal or lower armor value. 

If there is a grade below this item (_leather, gold, iron, diamond_), then the **lower grade** items will be **ignored** 

**Only vanilla armor pieces are replaced**, with the exception of chainmail ones.

_I might add whitelist/blacklist support in the future to control both which armors can be replaced and which armors can appear as replacements_

This was my first experience of Minecraft modding
